scope: Wave 7 registry promotion from Prompt 62-69 polished Swahili routes only. No page copy edited in Prompt 70.
screeningCriteria: indexable route with canonical and substantial meta description
not already present in the Swahili registry
no obvious repair artifact or English-only panel after Prompt 62-69 polish
clear category fit and useful Swahili discovery value

metricNotes: swZanaRegistryHrefCount counts every unique Swahili registry href under /sw/zana/, including any non-direct child routes if present.
directSwZanaRegistryCovered counts only /sw/zana/<slug>/ routes that resolve to source HTML files.
